contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on an hci_dev object by calling hci_free_dev, which decrements the embedded kref and may free the object. The caller must not use the device pointer after calling this function, as it indicates ownership is relinquished. No return value to check; the operation is unconditional.
